chapter_title: Strategies for schools in managing students with a Green Plan
snippet: Schools must develop an Individual Allergic Reaction Risk Management Plan for students with a Green Plan and must: Schools must review a student's Individual Allergic Reactions Risk Management Plan: Note: Although students with a Green Plan are assessed as being at less risk for anaphylaxis it is important to note that anaphylaxis can occur in any student with food/insect allergy at any time. General use adrenaline auto injectors held by the school should be administered in the event of anaphylaxis occurring in these students.
